products.title: 1 Day Fraser Island Tour
products.description: Discover the magic of K'gari (Fraser Island), the world's largest sand island and UNESCO World Heritage site. This action-packed day tour takes you to iconic locations including pristine freshwater lakes, ancient rainforests, and the famous 75 Mile Beach. Experience the ultimate 4WD adventure with our expert guides.

about_tour: Explore the world's largest sand island and UNESCO World Heritage site
Visit iconic locations including Lake McKenzie and Maheno Shipwreck
Drive along the famous 75 Mile Beach highway
Experience ancient rainforests growing in sand
Spot native wildlife including dingoes, wallabies, and tropical birds
inclusions: Return ferry transfers to Fraser Island
Swimming stops at lakes and creeks

tour_itinerary.title: Pickup and Ferry Departure
tour_itinerary.description: Early morning pickup from Sunshine Coast, followed by scenic ferry crossing to Fraser Island.

tour_itinerary.title: Central Station & Rainforest
tour_itinerary.description: Explore ancient rainforests and learn about the island's unique ecosystem.

tour_itinerary.title: Lake McKenzie
tour_itinerary.description: Swim in the crystal-clear waters of one of the world's most beautiful freshwater lakes.

tour_itinerary.title: 75 Mile Beach Drive
tour_itinerary.description: Experience the thrill of driving on the island's famous beach highway.

tour_itinerary.title: Lunch at Eurong
tour_itinerary.description: Enjoy lunch with ocean views at the Eurong Beach Resort area.

tour_itinerary.title: Maheno Shipwreck
tour_itinerary.description: Explore the historic shipwreck and learn about its fascinating history.

tour_itinerary.title: Eli Creek
tour_itinerary.description: Float down the pristine freshwater creek or enjoy a refreshing swim.

tour_itinerary.title: Return Ferry
tour_itinerary.description: Ferry back to mainland with incredible sunset views.

tour_itinerary.title: Drop-off
tour_itinerary.description: Return to your Sunshine Coast accommodation.

what_to_expect: Comfortable 4WD ferry crossing to Fraser Island
Expert guide with extensive island knowledge
Swimming in crystal-clear freshwater lakes
Beach driving on 75 Mile Beach
Rainforest walks through unique ecosystems
Indigenous cultural insights
Morning tea and lunch included

products.title: 1 Day Rainbow Beach Tour
products.description: Embark on an unforgettable 4WD adventure through the stunning colored sands of Rainbow Beach. This full-day tour offers the perfect blend of excitement and natural beauty, taking you to one of Queensland's most spectacular off-road destinations. Our experienced guides will ensure you have a safe and memorable experience exploring Rainbow Beach in comfort and style.

about_tour: Experience the thrill of 4WD driving on Rainbow Beach's famous colored sands
Discover hidden freshwater creeks and secluded coastal spots
Learn about the local ecosystem and indigenous culture from expert guides
Enjoy a picnic lunch with stunning ocean views (included)
Perfect for first-time 4WD adventurers and families
exclusions: Additional food and beverages not specified
inclusions: Hotel pickup and drop-off (Sunshine Coast area)

tour_itinerary.title: Pickup from Meeting Point
tour_itinerary.description: We'll collect you from your accommodation or designated meeting point on the Sunshine Coast.

tour_itinerary.title: Rainbow Beach Arrival
tour_itinerary.description: Arrive at Rainbow Beach and receive a comprehensive safety briefing about the 4WD experience.

tour_itinerary.title: 4WD Adventure Begins
tour_itinerary.description: Hit the colored sands and experience the thrill of 4WD driving on one of Australia's most iconic beaches.

tour_itinerary.title: Lunch Break
tour_itinerary.description: Enjoy a picnic lunch with stunning ocean views (lunch included in tour price).

tour_itinerary.title: Explore Hidden Gems
tour_itinerary.description: Visit secluded spots, freshwater creeks, and learn about the local ecosystem from our expert guides.

tour_itinerary.title: Return Journey
tour_itinerary.description: Head back to Rainbow Beach with memories and photos to last a lifetime.

tour_itinerary.title: Drop-off
tour_itinerary.description: Return to your accommodation or meeting point.

what_to_expect: Professional 4WD vehicle with all safety equipment
Comprehensive safety briefing before departure
Multiple beach driving experiences on colored sands
Visits to secluded spots and freshwater creeks
Wildlife spotting opportunities
Small group sizes for personalized attention
All-weather tour with covered vehicle

products.title: 2 Day Fraser + Rainbow Combo
products.description: The ultimate 2-day 4WD adventure combining the best of Fraser Island and Rainbow Beach. Experience pristine lakes, ancient rainforests, the famous Maheno Shipwreck, and Rainbow Beach's spectacular colored cliffs. This tour includes comfortable eco-lodge accommodation and all meals.

about_tour: Comprehensive 2-day exploration of Fraser Island and Rainbow Beach
Stay overnight in comfortable eco-lodge accommodation
All meals included - breakfast, lunch, and dinner
Small group sizes ensuring personalized attention
Perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and natural beauty

tour_itinerary.title: Fraser Island Departure
tour_itinerary.description: Begin your 2-day adventure with pickup and ferry crossing to Fraser Island.

tour_itinerary.title: Lake McKenzie
tour_itinerary.description: Swim in the crystal-clear waters of one of the world's most beautiful lakes.

tour_itinerary.title: Maheno Shipwreck & Beach Drive
tour_itinerary.description: Explore the historic shipwreck and drive along 75 Mile Beach.

tour_itinerary.title: Eco-Lodge Check-in
tour_itinerary.description: Settle into your comfortable eco-lodge accommodation and enjoy dinner.

tour_itinerary.title: Champagne Pools
tour_itinerary.description: Start with a refreshing swim in the natural rock pools.

tour_itinerary.title: Rainforest Walk
tour_itinerary.description: Experience ancient rainforests and pristine creeks.

tour_itinerary.title: Return Journey
tour_itinerary.description: Ferry back to mainland and return to Sunshine Coast.

what_to_expect: Two full days of 4WD adventures
Swimming in Lake McKenzie and Champagne Pools
Exploring the Maheno Shipwreck and 75 Mile Beach
Rainbow Beach colored sands and cliffs
Comfortable eco-lodge accommodation
All meals and refreshments included
Expert guides sharing local knowledge

products.title: 3 Day Fraser & Rainbow Combo
products.description: Experience the ultimate 3-day 4WD adventure exploring Fraser Island's hidden gems and Rainbow Beach's spectacular coastline. This extended tour allows time to discover remote locations, pristine beaches, and ancient rainforests at a relaxed pace. Includes 2 nights accommodation and all meals.

about_tour: Extended 3-day exploration with more time at each location
Visit remote areas rarely seen by day-trippers
2 nights in quality eco-lodge accommodation
All meals included throughout the tour
Relaxed pace allowing for spontaneous wildlife encounters
Ideal for photography enthusiasts and nature lovers
inclusions: Professional photography tips and digital photos

tour_itinerary.title: Fraser Island Exploration
tour_itinerary.description: Begin your 3-day adventure with comprehensive tours of Fraser Island's top attractions including Lake McKenzie, Central Station rainforest, and 75 Mile Beach.

tour_itinerary.title: Remote Island Experience
tour_itinerary.description: Discover hidden gems and remote locations including Indian Head lookout, Champagne Pools, and secluded beaches. Enjoy sunset views from the eco-lodge.

tour_itinerary.title: Rainbow Beach & Return
tour_itinerary.description: Explore Rainbow Beach colored cliffs, enjoy final beach drives, and capture stunning coastal photography before returning to Sunshine Coast.

what_to_expect: Three full days of immersive 4WD experiences
Access to remote beaches and hidden freshwater lakes
Extended rainforest walks and wildlife spotting
Sunrise and sunset photography opportunities
Quality accommodation with modern amenities
Gourmet meals featuring local Queensland produce
Small group ensuring personalized experiences

products.title: 4 Day Fraser & Rainbow Combo
products.description: The most comprehensive 4WD adventure available on the Sunshine Coast. This 4-day expedition covers every corner of Fraser Island and Rainbow Beach, including exclusive access to remote 4WD tracks and hidden locations. Perfect for serious adventurers seeking the ultimate off-road experience.

about_tour: The ultimate 4-day expedition for serious adventurers
Access to exclusive remote tracks and hidden locations
3 nights in premium eco-lodge accommodation
All gourmet meals and refreshments included
Maximum 6 guests for exclusive small group experience
Extended wildlife observation and photography opportunities
Learn advanced 4WD driving techniques from experts
inclusions: Premium 4WD vehicle with all safety equipment
All gourmet meals (4 breakfasts, 4 lunches, 3 dinners)
National park permits and exclusive track access

tour_itinerary.title: Fraser Island Deep Dive
tour_itinerary.description: Comprehensive exploration of Fraser Island's southern highlights including Lake McKenzie, Central Station, and 75 Mile Beach with extended time at each location.

tour_itinerary.title: Northern Fraser Expedition
tour_itinerary.description: Journey to the northern reaches including Indian Head, Champagne Pools, and remote beaches. Learn advanced 4WD techniques on challenging tracks.

tour_itinerary.title: Hidden Gems & Exclusive Tracks
tour_itinerary.description: Access exclusive 4WD tracks to discover hidden lakes, remote rainforests, and secluded beaches known only to expert guides.

tour_itinerary.title: Rainbow Beach & Coastal Finale
tour_itinerary.description: Explore Rainbow Beach colored cliffs, Double Island Point, and enjoy final coastal adventures before returning with unforgettable memories.

what_to_expect: Four full days of comprehensive exploration
Remote 4WD tracks accessible only to experienced guides
Multiple locations for swimming, fishing, and relaxation
Sunrise and sunset sessions at iconic viewpoints
Premium accommodation with spa facilities
Gourmet dining experience with local Queensland cuisine
Advanced 4WD driving instruction (optional)
Extensive wildlife encounters and conservation insights
